name: Crispy Honey Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine honey, white Worcestershire sauce, and ginger.
2. Grill the chicken wings over medium coals, 4-6 inches from the heat, for 20-25 minutes. Brush frequently with the honey mixture.
3. Turn the wings after 10 minutes of grilling.
4. Continue grilling until the chicken is cooked through. If white Worcestershire sauce is unavailable, use the dark-colored variety instead.
